/CAL:JURY TRIAL & DA MOT TO CONTINUE/FTRRECORDED/DEF: ON 2 HR SB/LD:03-24-22 (GC COVID19- GIN TAKEN 032422)/X:DEFENSE OBJECTS & SUBMITS ON THE MOTION TO CONTINUE/MO GRTD/X:UNTIL 04-25-22/X:COURT CONTINUES TO FIND GOOD CAUSE OVER DEFENSE OBJECTION PURS PC1382/DEF:CONTINUES ON 2HR SB/CONT/X:JURY TRIAL DATE RESCHEDULED OUT OF PRESENCE OF COUNSEL & NOT RECORDED/

/CAL:TRIAL & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/FTRRECORDED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONSAT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/DEF:SHALL BE TRANSFERED FROM CUSTODY TO PARTICIPATE IN HARBOR LIGHTS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AND REPORT TOACM ONCE A WEEK BY PHONE/LDTR:03-24-22/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/DOPU:IN TREATMENT
/CAL:TO SET & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/FTRRECORDED/LDTR:03-24-22/VD:ARRAIGNMENT DATE IN DEPT 22/BAIL:7,500/CONTD:JURY TRIAL & FURTHER ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, DEFENSE GREEN MOTION AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:SUBPOENA RECORDS ENVELOPE #1 IS RELEASED TO THE PUBLIC DEFENDER WITHOUT REQUEST FOR EC1560 STIPULATION,/X:SUBPOENA RECORDS ENVELOPE #2 IS RELEASED TO THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY WITH EC1560 STIPULATION BY THE PUBLIC DEFENDER,/X:THEPUBLIC DEFENDER'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE IS WITHDRAWN FOR PRELIMINARYHEARING,/X:COURT GRANTS THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO BE ABSENT FROM COURTROOM DURING WITNESS IDENTIFICATION PURSUANT TO PEOPLE VS, GREEN,/ /WIT SWORN:ELISEO TEREZ VELASQUEZ, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ANDREA POLLOCK/WIT SWORN:NICK KYRIAKOU/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER AARON BJORKQUIST/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B),/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:03-24-22//VD:MHD AND ACM ELIGIBLITY REPORTS ON 03-01-22 IN D11/CONTD:MHD-ACM ELIGIBLITY REPORTS AND TO SET ON 03-01-22 IN D17/DOP/

/CAL:ACM ICR/X:THE DATE OF 02-17-22 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD PC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:02-22-22/S11/CONTD ELIG RPT FROM JPS/TEXT:CRTORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 1001,36 FOR REFERRAL TO MHD/JAIL PSY/MHD/REP:03-01-22)/S11/CONTD: ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT AND RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT ON 02-22-22 AND RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM JPS FOR MENTAL HEALTH DIVERSION REFERRAL ON 03-01-22, TRAILING #22001147/DOPC/
